recentTweets.text: Proud to stand up and fight for the people of Northwest Florida. Thank you, Mr. President, for your endorsement for re-election. I won’t let you down! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/AePYhgG2NA

Marjorie, We ALL have worked hard for @realDonaldTrump and we have lots of work still to do TOGETHER for our constituents.
Please quit being an instigator, you’re doing more harm than good.
I love seeing folks succeed!
I’m done with NIL. Enormous pots of money thrown at high school kids is destroying college football. Amateur athletics is getting poisoned. If they want to be paid, go straight to the NFL.

This peace agreement really demonstrates how completely useless Obama, Biden and Hillary were… 

Their “non-profits” made lots of money though!!!
Chuck Schumer may not care care about our soldiers, but thank God President Trump does.

Seven years ago today, my wife Katie underwent breast cancer surgery. Today, we celebrate her strength, her courage, and the grace that carried her through. Grateful for every moment since and for the incredible woman she continues to be. https://t.co/xdEC4HoGxr

Will you help me wish the 🐐 a very happy birthday?!!!!
🎂

I will be proposing a National Day of Remembrance for Charlie Kirk. He championed free speech, civil dialogue, faith, and in his passing, will forever symbolize the best of America. I want future generations of American children to know his name forever.

My hope is the same angel that protected President Trump was with Charlie too. 

Everyone pray for Charlie Kirk. https://t.co/6mK5rjzB0k

Florida got a big win last night. 

With the NYC election, more cash is about to move to Florida from the newly socialized People’s Republic of New York City. 

Enjoy the bread lines, we’ll take your billionaires. 

Also, lol Cuomo.

Only one President did something about it.
All I can think of is @catturd2 🤣

The Florida delegation, led by @SenRickScott sent a letter to @realDonaldTrump requesting NASA HQ be relocated to Florida. 

I was proud to support this effort, especially with greater activity related to the Gulf Of America.

Awesome seeing @ByronDonalds last night. He’s a great guy, pure MAGA, one of the President’s staunchest defenders, and a friend. He’s also done a great job for his constituents. Lots of great things to come! https://t.co/pAONMmAnF1

***PRESS RELEASE***

REMARKS FROM OFFICIAL SWEARING IN CEREMONY OF JIMMY PATRONIS TO CONGRESS

Mr. Speaker: 
 
It’s an honor to be here and represent the men and women of Florida’s First Congressional District.  
 
As a lifelong native of Florida’s Panhandle I am ready to get to https://t.co/uEsaxmQtTa
Guess who is going to Washington?!!! This family!!! 🇺🇸 Thank you NW Florida, I won’t let you down! #flapol https://t.co/TJ7O1OtEEk

Just received a call from the President. He’s the best. Couldn’t be more honored. Told him the $6 million against me couldn’t compete against his Truth Social posts. Ready to serve. Thanks for everyone’s support.

THANK YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP!

THANK YOU, FL-01!

I’m humbled by your support, and I promise to never let you down.

Together, we can and will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! https://t.co/pP5b5q2T0q

GOOD MORNING, IT’S ELECTION DAY! 

Remember: CD-1 is in the CENTRAL TIME ZONE. 

I would be honored to have your vote, no Joke!

Visit https://t.co/ESGhJ9dRBT to find your voting location.

Please share with your friends!

Florida: 
 
Today is my last day as your Chief Financial Officer, and I just wanted to thank each and every one of you who have followed the operations of this office over the years. 
 
I loved being your CFO, I loved serving as the State Fire Marshal, and I’m gonna miss it all.
Thank You Mr. President! Looking forward to Making America Great Again! 🇺🇸 🫡 💪

The fight for America’s soul is happening right here in CD-1. The anti-freedom, anti-Christian, anti-America party is directing millions of dollars from Blue States to the Panhandle to ruin our chance to fix this country. I’m standing in their way! 

Early voting starts Saturday!

Welp. 

Congress can go ahead and zero out cash for Ukraine as far as I’m concerned. 

America is tired of being your ATM . 

Good luck.  

PS. When you meet with @realDonaldTrump & @VP, you wear a suit!
President Trump is the most transparent, visible, public figure ever in American history. He says what we all think…

Today is Primary Election Day! Today is the first day you have in one voice making it clear that we Stand with President Trump to stop the madness in our country. Send me to Washington, let me be your voice to Make America Great Again! I would appreciate your vote! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/QJDQDZiJnq

.@VivekGRamaswamy is one of the most accessible public figures I’ve had the privilege of working with. He is completely dedicated to saving our country. He spearheaded the fight to dismantle ESG. He is a businessman who understands the requirements for job growth, government
America’s next Attorney General @PamBondi. https://t.co/EfKoWMSQkS

I am so fired up! 

Between @realDonaldTrump, @catturd2 and the Catturd Army’s support, I could run through a brick wall to get this country back on track! 

Your comments are awesome! 

We’re gonna fix this country TOGETHER!

My TEN Resolutions for the 119th Congress: 

1.)End backroom dealing. The people put you there, act like it! 

2.) Wall, wall, and more wall. Without a border, you’re not a country. 

3.) Trump’s in Charge! The American people have signed on to his vision of putting our country
Put me to work, Mr. President! @realDonaldTrump I am here to serve. 🫡
I am strongly considering running for Florida Congressional District 1. We’ve got an historic opportunity to fight the swamp, end lawfare and return power back into the hands of Americans. #flapol

Throwback to 2019, I caught this photo of future COS Susie Wiles being greeted by @realDonaldTrump in Panama City, he announced the rebuilding Tyndall AFB that day. I always say, if you want to get something done, put a woman in charge, congratulations Susie! 🇺🇸 #flapol https://t.co/YefNcDfhUi

I’m outraged by the lack of pre-staging of assets by @Verizon in Polk County. This is Hurricane Michael all over again. 1M people are without cell service after Hurricane Milton. Unacceptable. We need that network up and running asap for our first responders. Can you hear me now?

If you had an EV that was impacted by storm surge, you need to get it towed away. 
The saltwater can compromise lithium-ion batteries, leading to thermal runaway, and that can burn down your home. That includes scooters, e-bikes, golf carts and tools. Get it away from your home. https://t.co/d1O7yoe7PO

Excited to bring a few adoptable dogs to the Florida Cabinet meeting this morning. I encourage all Floridians to consider dog adoption and give these great pups a forever home! Thanks to @LeonCtyHumane for joining us today. #PatronisPups 🐶 🐕 https://t.co/BOUM7SsnbP

This is gross and despicable. New York is about to lose way more money than that because of you. There was no victim and you still went after Trump. If you’re a company looking to get away from this nightmare, move to Florida. Contact my office.

College football is broken and the @NCAA needs to be investigated. I’m tired of the politics of @CharlieBakerMA and @StanWilcox5 and their petty attacks on @FSUFootball and the State of Florida. Baker won’t return my calls because he’s furious with Florida over the Martha’s

I LOVE THIS! Gators and Seminoles unite against injustice in college sports. WE NEED TRANSPARENCY. Thanks to @AGAshleyMoody for jumping on board with @GovRonDesantis, @SenRickScott, and myself to hold the @CFBplayoff Committee accountable. #FlaPol

The unprecedented decision to leave @FSUFootball out of the @CFBPlayoff is weighing on my heart. 

.@Coach_Norvell, the players and all college football fans need answers. Call me @BooCorrigan. Lets chat. 👇 https://t.co/MKIL1Pxmss

The @CFBPlayoff committee must shed more light on their unprecedented decision to leave @FSUFootball out of the playoff. @GovRonDeSantis is fighting for  $1M to defend our institutions and I’ll have no problem cutting those checks. #FlaPol

Any @CFBPlayoff committee member that wishes to come forward to disclose their votes should do so NOW. I’m in conversations with legislators on additional action. Playoff committee members should take steps to preserve all documents. @FSUFootball #FlaPol
Shameful decision by the @CFBPlayoff Committee. I DEMAND a full explanation. 👇 https://t.co/h7xadQl0ge

Thank you to @FSUFootball QB @jordantrav13 for your dedication & leadership throughout your time in Tallahassee. You’ve made the State of Florida proud and I can’t wait to see what the future holds for you. #GoNoles #FinishFor13 https://t.co/kvJPYdEvdQ
You’re not an elected official anymore. You’re a full time Twitter troll. I represent 20 M + Floridians, MANY of which are supporters of Israel. There’s ZERO accountability from Washington.
When you pay for hostages, more hostages get taken. This is EXACTLY what happened yesterday. Biden was wrong to send 6 billion in cash to Iran.

Florida 100%, unequivocally stands with the people of Israel. Evil is real. Innocent people died at the hands of radical Islam. The United States must fully back Israel’s efforts to protect its people. I pray for those lost souls and the families left grieving. 🇮🇱  🇺🇸

The ⁦@NCAA⁩ are a bunch of out-of-touch hypocrites. NC threatens antitrust allegations and they punted to save face on their terrible decision. #FSU’s Darrell Jackson must play NOW. We’ll take legal action soon if they don’t reverse course. #FlaPol  https://t.co/1uXwHpOPOd
If Washington worked like Florida we wouldn’t be in this mess.

Just so we’re clear, the Inflation Reduction Act didn’t reduce inflation. Based on today's CPI report, inflation is UP. However, what Biden's law did do is create an army of 87,000 IRS personnel to go after small businesses in Florida. Apparently, Washington needs more money...

Today, we released bill text so Florida can fight back against the IRS. I’ve always said transparency is the best disinfectant, so we’ll have state chartered banks report when the IRS is engaging them. The info will help us fight IRS targeting. READ HERE: https://t.co/aI1pgdylyj https://t.co/NVjQsH792K

The IRS targeted the Tea Party in 2013. Now they’re getting 87,000 new agents. The IRS is a political wing of Biden and cannot be trusted. That’s why one of my proposals forces certain IRS agents to be licensed. If they repeat what they did to the Tea Party, we’ll prosecute them.

We are going to protect Floridians from @JoeBiden's supersized IRS by requiring state chartered banks to report audits and IRS agents to be licensed. We'll also create defense mechanism for those being persecuted and prosecute if Floridians were targeted for beliefs/affiliations. https://t.co/m6Hl3ywou2
